## Scheduler class

调度器

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class Scheduler 
```

## Remarks

管理所有需调度的任务并进行循环调度，默认采用requestAnimationFrame方式进行循环

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [addTask(foo, thiser)](./nodomx.scheduler.addtask.md) | <code>static</code> | 添加任务 |
|  [dispatch()](./nodomx.scheduler.dispatch.md) | <code>static</code> | 执行任务 |
|  [removeTask(foo)](./nodomx.scheduler.removetask.md) | <code>static</code> | 移除任务 |
|  [start(scheduleTick)](./nodomx.scheduler.start.md) | <code>static</code> | 启动调度器 |
